name: mcp-tooling
description: Parent hub for MCP tool bridges: routes to two workflow modes (mcp-chrome-devtools for browser inspection and debugging, mcp-click-up for ClickUp task management) plus one figma transport (mcp-figma, bridging to Figma Desktop) through mode-registry.json and hub-router.json. The advisor sees one hub identity; workflowMode selects the packet. mcp-code-mode is the shared MCP execution substrate all three modes reach through the unchanged code_mode registration key — it is external infrastructure, not a hub member, and stays a flat standalone skill.
trigger_examples: Use Chrome DevTools to capture a HAR for the staging dashboard
Mark the ClickUp task done with a note
Render this component in Figma and export the tokens
Route this MCP tool bridge request
